summary: At 1:10 pm on 27 March 2023, Audrey and Andrew caught up. Andrew shared about his new job as a Financial Analyst, whereas Audrey talked about getting new collars for her dogs named Pepper, Precious, and Panda that she has had for 3 years. The dogs, city dwellers, go on adventures exploring parks and trails together. Andrew loves animals, particularly birds, with a fascination for eagles. He recommended the Fox Hollow trail for hiking to Audrey, who planned to give it a try. They bid goodbye, wishing each other well.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Hey Andrew! Good to see ya! What's been up since we last talked?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Hey Audrey! So, I started a new job as a Financial Analyst last week - it's been quite a change from my previous job. How about you? Anything interesting happening?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Congrats on the new job! So I got these new collars and tags for my dogs - so cute!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Thanks! That sounds cute. Can I see a picture?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Sure! See them with their new collars, cute right?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Cute little guys! What are their names and how long have you had them?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: I've had them for 3 years! Their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda. I can't live without my little ones!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: That's awesome! Have you always wanted a dog, even with living in the city? Can they still go on adventures?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Absolutely! They're city dogs and we explore all the time. They love trying out new parks and trails. We go on adventures together very often.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Wow, sounds like they make life so awesome! Kinda jealous of all those fun outings with them.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: They really do! It's great how much happiness they bring. Do you have any pets?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: No, no pets right now. But I do love animals.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: That's great to hear! Animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: I've always been awed by birds. Their power to soar and explore new spots is amazing.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Yeah, birds are amazing! I can imagine it feels incredible to soar and see the world from up high. Do you have a favorite type of bird?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Eagles have always mesmerized me; they're so strong and graceful!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Yeah they're beautiful. Do you go bird-watching? It must be awesome to see them up close.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Haven't specifically gone out for bird-watching, but I do spot them when I hike.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Nice, spotting pretty birds while hiking must be great. Do you have any favorite hiking spots?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Fox Hollow is a great trail to hike on weekends; the views are awesome!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Cool, gonna give it a try. Thanks for the suggestion!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: No problem! Let me know how you like it. Have fun hiking!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Thanks! I'll let you know. Have a good one!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Take care and have a good one! See ya!

history.content: Hey Audrey! What's up? Missed chatting with ya! Check it out, my girl & I tried out that new cafe scene in the city last weekend! Super fun but kinda sad not being out in nature - that's when I feel like I'm really thriving. Oh man, I miss the peacefulness of being out on a hike.

history.content: Hey Andrew! That cafe sounds pretty awesome, glad you enjoyed it. Yeah, I know what you mean. That feeling of being out in nature, surrounded by beauty and peace, is unbeatable, compared to being surrounded by concrete jungles.

history.speaker: Andrew

history.content: That looks delicious! A pastry party sounds awesome, count me in!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Hey Andrew! Long time no talk! Last week I finally went on a hike and had this amazing experience with a hummingbird. It was so cool watching it dart around with its wings! Nature is so beautiful.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Hey Audrey! Glad to hear from you. That hummingbird was awesome! Nature's the best. Remember I was feeling down because I couldn't get out more? Well, good news - I found a new open space to hike nearby - feels so refreshing!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: That looks great! How often are you able to go hiking now?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: So I usually try to escape the city at least once a weekend - it's my much-needed break!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Nice! I Bet it's great to get away like that.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Yep! Nature is so therapeutic for me. It's hard to put into words how great it feels to be surrounded by greenery or standing on top of a mountain breathing in the fresh air. So peaceful and invigorating.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Wow, that view looks great! It really captures that calming and peaceful feeling. It must be really satisfying to capture that tranquility.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Yeah! I try to capture those special moments and share that feeling with others.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: That's really cool! Spreading that peaceful feeling to others is such a great way to bring happiness and motivation.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: I agree! It brings me joy to spread that feeling and motivate people to find their own peace - it's like a ripple effect, spreading positivity.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Absolutely. Not only the receiving end feels great, the person spreading it will feel great as well!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Yeah, it's crazy how that can bring such great joy and calm to people.

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Yeah, by sharing something can make a big difference to others.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Yup! We don't realize it, but even the littlest gestures can have a big effect. Spreading good vibes and joy, that's the goal right? So what's up? Anything new or fun going on?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Not much has changed since we last talked. I'm busy taking care of my pets and spending time with them. It's really fulfilling.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: I bet it's awesome hanging out with them - do your dogs enjoy going on hikes?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: My dogs go nuts when we go on hikes! They love exploring new scents and being in nature - it's their happy place. I can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it. It's so great to see them having so much fun!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Wow, that's great! I was wondering if you have any tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Definitely! Safety is super important for me. I even got them something special. They sure look funny, but it works!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Aww, that's so cute! Do they enjoy wearing the party hats? And where did you find their playdates?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: The hats don't bother them, they just put them on for fun and treats. And the dog park is great place to start! They can run and mingle with other pooches. It's such a fun spot for playdates!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: That sounds great! Where is it located?

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: It's right by the park we usually walk. It's a great spot with lots of trees and benches for us to watch the dogs play.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: That's awesome, not too far away then! I'll have to check it out. Thanks for the suggestion!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Yup! Not at all! Let me know how it goes.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Sure, I'll let you know. Always great chatting with you! Ttyl.

history.content: Hi Audrey! I had a great hike last weekend with some friends and my girlfriend at the spot we found recently. Nature was so peaceful – it was so nice to just relax and take it in. How's your week been? Anything exciting going on lately?

history.content: Hey Andrew! That hike sounds great. Nature is good for the soul, right? My week's been good - taking care of my four doggies and making sure they're happy and healthy took up most of my free time. Also, exciting news! I signed up for a workshop about bonding with my pet next month. Can't wait to learn new stuff and strengthen my bond with my pets. What's up with you?

history.content: That's awesome! Glad have the opportunity to bond with your pets. That workshop sounds cool. Where did you hear about it? And the one in the picture is adorable!

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: I know right? I saw this workshop flyer at my local pet store. It was a positive reinforcement training class and I wanted to give it a shot. The volunteer in the store was nice enough to let me meet their dog – he was so friendly and playful!

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Cool! Positive reinforcement can really help you bond with your dogs. Do you think they'll catch on quickly?

history.content: I'm sure they'll catch on really quick! They're quick learners and love rewards! Can't wait to learn how to train them better.

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: That's awesome! Keep me updated on their progress.

history.speaker: Audrey

history.content: Thanks! I'm excited to hear about it. Have a great time at the workshop!

history.content: I'll definitely have a good time and make the most of it. I'm sure this is a must learn for any dog owner.

history.speaker: Andrew

history.speaker: Audrey
history.content: Haha, I just think its important to have pets learn how to behave on a positive reinforcement way. Punishment is never the proper way for pets ya know?

history.speaker: Andrew
history.content: Yeah I would't want to be punished, let alone puppies and dogs.

history.speaker: Audrey
